languages.text: Вскоре офицеры, подключенные к судну, стали слышать темные послания среди статики вокса. Сводя их с ума, узы скверны навсегда сцепили офицеров с переборками корабля, превратив тот в объятого порождениями варпа и вечно страдающего левиафана, принцип работы систем которого неспособен постичь ни один разум.

The officers connected to the ship soon began to hear dark messages amid the vox static. Driving them insane, the shackles of corruption forever bound the officers to the bulkheads of the ship, which in turn became a leviathan trapped in endless torment, plagued by warp spawn. After that, the principles by which the vessel's systems operated eluded the comprehension of any mind.
languages.original_text: Вскоре офицеры, подключенные к судну, стали слышать темные послания среди статики вокса. Сводя их с ума, узы скверны навсегда сцепили офицеров с переборками корабля, превратив тот в объятого порождениями варпа и вечно страдающего левиафана, принцип работы систем которого неспособен постичь ни один разум.

After that, the principles by which the vessel's systems operated eluded the comprehension of any mind.

The officers connected to the ship soon began to hear dark messages amid the vox static. Driving them insane and triggering monstrous mutations, the shackles of corruption forever bound the officers to the bulkheads of the ship, which in turn became a leviathan trapped in endless torment, plagued by warp spawn. After that, the principles by which the vessel's systems operated eluded the comprehension of any mind.

languages.text: 艦に接続された士官たちは、やがてヴォックスの雑音の中に暗き声を聞くようになった。彼らを狂気に陥れ、怪物じみた変異を引き起こしながら、堕落の枷は士官たちを永遠に艦の隔壁へと縛りつけ、艦はそれによってワープ・スポーンに苛まれ、終わりなき苦悶に囚われた巨獣と化した。それ以降、この艦の諸システムが作動する原理を、いかなる者の理解も及ばぬものとなった。
languages.original_text: The officers connected to the ship soon began to hear dark messages amid the vox static. Driving them insane and triggering monstrous mutations, the shackles of corruption forever bound the officers to the bulkheads of the ship, which in turn became a leviathan trapped in endless torment, plagued by warp spawn. After that, the principles by which the vessel's systems operated eluded the comprehension of any mind.

traits.locale_text: 腐敗の鎖は、永遠にその船の壁にエンジニアを縛り付け、悪魔に悩まされる巨大な生き物に変えた。船のシステムが動く原理は、もはや誰も理解できなくなっていた。
艦に接続された士官たちは、やがてヴォックスの雑音の中に暗き声を聞くようになった。彼らを狂気に陥れ、怪物じみた変異を引き起こしながら、堕落の枷は士官たちを永遠に艦の隔壁へと縛りつけ、艦はそれによってワープ・スポーンに苛まれ、終わりなき苦悶に囚われた巨獣と化した。それ以降、この艦の諸システムが作動する原理を、いかなる者の理解も及ばぬものとなった。

languages.text: 很快，那些接入舰船的军官便开始在音阵的静电噪音中听到黑暗的信息。腐化的枷锁将他们逼疯，引发了可怕的变异，最终将他们永远禁锢在舱壁中。舰船自身也沦为一头巨兽，被困于无尽折磨之中，不断遭受亚空间孽物的侵扰。在那之后，舰船系统的运作原理，再无任何心智能够理解。
languages.original_text: The officers connected to the ship soon began to hear dark messages amid the vox static. Driving them insane and triggering monstrous mutations, the shackles of corruption forever bound the officers to the bulkheads of the ship, which in turn became a leviathan trapped in endless torment, plagued by warp spawn. After that, the principles by which the vessel's systems operated eluded the comprehension of any mind.

traits.locale_text: 很快，那些接入舰船的军官便开始在音阵的静电噪音中听到黑暗的信息。腐化的枷锁将他们逼疯，引发了可怕的变异，最终将他们永远禁锢在舱壁中。舰船自身也沦为一头巨兽，被困于无尽折磨之中，不断遭受亚空间孽物的侵扰。在那之后，舰船系统的运作原理，再无任何心智能够理解。

languages.text: Les officiers reliés au vaisseau commencèrent à entendre parmi les grésillements des vox des messages des plus inquiétants. Les entraves de la corruption leur firent perdre la tête, déclenchant en eux des mutations monstrueuses. Elles lièrent à jamais les officiers aux cloisons du vaisseau, qui se transforma en un véritable léviathan corrompu par des abominations du Warp et piégé dans des tourments éternels. Les principes régissant le fonctionnement du vaisseau devinrent alors un mystère dépassant l'entendement.
languages.original_text: The officers connected to the ship soon began to hear dark messages amid the vox static. Driving them insane and triggering monstrous mutations, the shackles of corruption forever bound the officers to the bulkheads of the ship, which in turn became a leviathan trapped in endless torment, plagued by warp spawn. After that, the principles by which the vessel's systems operated eluded the comprehension of any mind.

traits.locale_text: Les officiers reliés au vaisseau commencèrent à entendre parmi les grésillements des vox des messages des plus inquiétants. Les entraves de la corruption leur firent perdre la tête, déclenchant en eux des mutations monstrueuses. Elles lièrent à jamais les officiers aux cloisons du vaisseau, qui se transforma en un véritable léviathan corrompu par des abominations du Warp et piégé dans des tourments éternels. Les principes régissant le fonctionnement du vaisseau devinrent alors un mystère dépassant l'entendement.

Les chaînes de la corruption lièrent à jamais les ingénieurs aux cloisons du vaisseau, qui se changea en un monstre gigantesque rempli de démons et piégé dans un tourment éternel. Les principes régissant le fonctionnement du vaisseau étaient maintenant un mystère dépassant l'entendement.

languages.text: Los oficiales conectados a la nave empezaron a captar siniestros mensajes entre las señales estáticas de los vocos. Las transmisiones los arrastraron a la locura y les provocaron horrendas mutaciones; las cadenas de la corrupción los ataron eternamente a los mamparos de la nave, que a su vez se convirtió en un leviatán atrapado en un sufrimiento perpetuo e infestado de engendros de la disformidad. Después de aquello, nadie consiguió entender los principios que permitían operar a los sistemas de la nave.
languages.original_text: The officers connected to the ship soon began to hear dark messages amid the vox static. Driving them insane and triggering monstrous mutations, the shackles of corruption forever bound the officers to the bulkheads of the ship, which in turn became a leviathan trapped in endless torment, plagued by warp spawn. After that, the principles by which the vessel's systems operated eluded the comprehension of any mind.

languages.text: Gemiye bağlanan subaylar çok geçmeden voks cızırtıları arasında karanlık mesajlar duymaya başladı. Onları deliliğe sürükleyen ve korkunç mutasyonları tetikleyen yozlaşma prangaları, subayları sonsuza dek geminin bölmelerine bağladı. Gemi de öte yaratığının musallat olduğu, sonsuz bir işkenceye hapsolmuş bir deve dönüştü. Sonrasında gemi sistemlerinin çalışma prensipleri, hiçbir zihnin kavrayamayacağı bir hâl aldı.
languages.original_text: The officers connected to the ship soon began to hear dark messages amid the vox static. Driving them insane and triggering monstrous mutations, the shackles of corruption forever bound the officers to the bulkheads of the ship, which in turn became a leviathan trapped in endless torment, plagued by warp spawn. After that, the principles by which the vessel's systems operated eluded the comprehension of any mind.

languages.text: Wenig später hörten die mit dem Schiff verbundenen Offiziere im Rauschen des Vox dunkle Botschaften. Diese raubten ihnen den Verstand und lösten monströse Mutationen aus, als die Ketten der Verderbnis die Offiziere auf ewig an die Schotten des Schiffs banden, das seinerseits zu einem Leviathan wurde, der in endloser Folter durch das Warpgezücht gefangen war. Danach vermochte die Funktionsprinzipien der Systeme des Schiffs kein Verstand mehr zu erfassen.
